active.name: Trinket
active.effects: Consume a charge to place an invisible {{tip|Totem Ward}} at the target location, which grants {{tip|sight}} of the surrounding area for {{pp|90 to 120|type=average champion level}} seconds ({{pp|210 to 90|type=average champion level}} seconds recharge time; 2 charges; 600 range).

effects_structured.raw: Consume a charge to place an invisible Totem Ward that grants vision for 90 to 120 seconds based on average champion level.
Stealth Ward stores up to 2 charges and recharges from 210 to 90 seconds based on average champion level.
A player can have at most 3 Totem/Stealth Wards on the map at one time.

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Execution model: Stealth Ward is a targeted trinket placement action (600 range) that consumes a charge and creates a ward with duration scaling by average champion level (90 to 120 seconds).
Visibility semantics: placed Stealth/Totem wards are briefly visible before entering stealth; the shared map limit is three active Totem/Stealth wards per player.
Charge cadence: recharge scales from 210 to 90 seconds by average champion level and is affected by item-haste trinket cooldown behavior.
Wave 120 (2026-02-25): `on_activate` entries with no fixed cooldown now use explicit `activation_cadence` charge-consumption schema.
